name: Fujio Food Group Inc.
summary: Fujio Food Group Inc. operates restaurant chains in Japan and internationally. The company is involved in the management of restaurants and franchise chains; and designing and planning activities related to the interior and exterior of the stores. It operates restaurants under the MaidoOokiniShokudo, KushiyaMonogatari, Kappougi, and Tsurumaru brands, as well as other sub-brands. Fujio Food Group Inc. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
